s: Note bird sightings quickly in the field and export to Artsobservasjoner
d:
Feltbok is an app to quickly log bird sightings in the field, and later export them to Artsobservasjoner. Does not require logging in or an internet connection. Features:
  • Quick entry of observations in the field
  • Easy export to Artsobservasjoner
  • Optimized species lookup: type one letter to find your bird
  • Map view to choose site
  • Fetch your private sites from Artsobservasjoner
  • Create new private sites
Feltbok is made for use in Norway, and the interface is in Norwegian only.
